FINAL_RESULT:
  UUID: fcca661f-8821-4303-a8e9-3490c1639ce9
  PREDICTED_SMILES: O=S(=O)(c1ccc(N)cc1)NC(=O)c1ccc(O)cc1
  CONFIDENCE: 0.7
  REASON_BRIEF: The molecular formula C14H10N2O2S gives a degree of unsaturation of 11, consistent with two aromatic rings plus three additional unsaturated bonds/groups. 1H NMR confirms two para-disubstituted benzene rings (four 2H aromatic doublets) and two exchangeable protons matching the NH of sulfonamide and phenolic OH groups, while IR characteristic peaks at 1322 cm⁻¹ and 1164 cm⁻¹ confirm the presence of a sulfonyl (SO2) group, aligning with the proposed core structure. The confidence is moderate as there is minor ambiguity from the carbonyl 13C shift relative to the formula oxygen count that would require further high resolution validation for full confirmation.

FINAL_RESULT:
  UUID: f77fd314-b8ae-4d51-92c7-da4007814e29
  PREDICTED_SMILES: Cc1ccc(C(c2ccc(C)cc2)(c2ccc(C)cc2)C(c2ccc(C)cc2)(c2ccccc2)c2ccccc2)cc1
  CONFIDENCE: 0.6
  REASON_BRIEF: The molecular formula C44H34 is confirmed by HRMS matching the measured molecular weight of 562 Da. 1H NMR shows 12 equivalent aromatic methyl protons (singlet at 2.00 ppm) and 22 aromatic protons consistent with four symmetric para-substituted tolyl groups and two unsubstituted phenyl groups attached to a highly substituted aliphatic core. 13C NMR confirms the presence of aromatic quaternary/CH environments and aromatic methyl groups, consistent with a symmetric hexaaryl-substituted ethane scaffold.
